Cloud & Platform Engineer · AI Infrastructure · DevOps

I turn cloud complexity into calm, reliable platforms.

7+ years building enterprise-grade cloud foundations across AWS, Azure, and GCP — from 100-server Azure migrations to award-winning AI products at UTA.

View Experience LinkedIn

About me

The short version

I enjoy making infrastructure invisible so builders can focus on what matters: shipping products, serving users, and learning faster.

My work sits at the intersection of platform engineering, DevOps automation, cloud architecture, and practical AI infrastructure — Azure Machine Learning, AWS SageMaker, and Bedrock.

This site is part portfolio, part living notebook — a place to share projects, ideas, and moments that shaped the engineer I am becoming.

AI Infrastructure

Building the plumbing for AI systems

☁

AWS SageMaker

End-to-end ML pipelines — training, model registry, and real-time endpoint deployment with IAM and VPC isolation.

🧠

Azure Machine Learning

MLOps on Azure — managed compute clusters, pipelines, model versioning, and private workspace networking.

💡

AWS Bedrock

Built ReRhythm on Bedrock (Claude) — RAG pipelines, Textract parsing, Comprehend moderation, KMS-encrypted DynamoDB.

📊

MLOps Principles

Reproducible pipelines, model drift monitoring, CI/CD-driven model deployment, and cost-optimised compute selection.

Certifications
